g.text: UPPER HALF — driven by Maj / Σ0
LOWER HALF — driven by Ch / Σ1
T1 = h + Σ1(e) + Ch(e,f,g) + K[t] + W[t] [mod 2³²]
new_a = T1 + T2 ← BOTH temporaries (hot path)
new_e = d + T1 ← message data injected
Carry bits in mod-2³² addition break GF(2) linearity
6 vars shift; only new_a and new_e receive computed values
64 rounds × this pattern = full avalanche across all 256 bits
